summary: Iteration 26 frontend testing completed successfully. All 11 test cases passed. Tested: Login Page two-column premium layout, Admin login flow with 'Verifizierter Zugang' badge, Unknown email registration flow, /admin redirect to /login without auth (Security by Obscurity), Mobile menu overlay with floating actions hidden, Mobile login responsive layout, 3D Hero Scene canvas, Cookie banner.
critical_code_review_comments: Admin.js line 310-318 correctly redirects to /login when no token (Security by Obscurity)
App.js lines 465-471 correctly manages mobile-menu-open body class via useEffect
App.css lines 908-909 correctly hide floating actions with visibility:hidden!important when mobile menu is open
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 26 tested all frontend features from the major rewrite: (1) UnifiedLogin.js two-column split-screen layout with registration flow works correctly, (2) App.js mobile menu state management with body.mobile-menu-open class works, floating actions hidden via visibility:hidden, (3) Admin.js redirects to /login when no token (security by obscurity), (4) Scene3D.js 3D canvas renders in hero section. All tests passed.
